## Download

| Platform | Architecture | File |
|----------|-------------|------|
| macOS | Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3) | `Patreon.Mailing-VERSION-arm64.dmg` |
| macOS | Intel | `Patreon.Mailing-VERSION-x64.dmg` |

> **First time installing?** macOS may block the app since it's unsigned.  
> Right-click the `.dmg` → **Open** → click **Open** in the confirmation dialog.
